rag_rules: Fix unresolved references in AGREE contracts by ensuring all identifiers are visible in the current scope or properly declared as helpers.
Resolve type mismatches in AGREE expressions by aligning helper declarations with the types of the referenced values.
generic_rules: When generating AGREE contracts, validate that all referenced identifiers are declared or visible in the current scope.
Ensure type consistency in AGREE expressions by matching helper declarations with the types of the referenced values.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts must be enclosed in `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks.
Use only visible AADL features or declared helpers in AGREE expressions to avoid 'named thing must be an expression with a type' errors.
anti_patterns: Avoid introducing package-qualified identifiers or property references not present in the model's configured dependencies.
Do not add architecture elements to fix AGREE diagnostics; instead, correct or remove invalid clauses.
